textByHashes.ec46bfdd9e8ed3be52fddba63a50416b4b439033: That General Wartface. He live in big hut.
textByHashes.d05d16e9835cb4b39c4c0ded19edae2fe2380b29: That General Bentnoze. He live in big hut.
textByHashes.b0b87d489ac47933adf943223066eb3169d9c6d7: He say Bentnoze is leader but real leader is Wartface!
textByHashes.52c25e3c25f07c86d33b0172599d62ae94aa039d: He say Wartface is leader but real leader is Wartface!
textByHashes.ad567f865e3c350564e6b2ee9ed55603db874b50: He say Bentnoze is leader but real leader is Bentnoze!
textByHashes.6c21bbd41b9190e60d40b3e6d9badec4e79c4f76: He say Wartface is leader but real leader is Bentnoze!
textByHashes.9d811c3109e67656248176d5a06f9dbb83662eda: You weak! You hide instead of fight!
textByHashes.f702439ceb7a08ce6ac290890a53be396369a009: Peace is for weak. We goblins! We strong!
textByHashes.b14b48684e2bd2a94e2316bdc9b3d4176fa657bf: Big High War God say so! He make us strong!
textByHashes.4b69dded2041b3a18f18321edc4f7fa7049576c2: Me hear Dorgesh tribe come back from underground. Maybe now all tribes united, prophecy will come true! Chosen Commander come and lead all tribes to victory over world!
textByHashes.67f305e8123ec516d23e66b609a38561c41daca0: Me hear there ghost in temple crypt! No one see it, but sometimes they hear it. 'Wooo... wooo...' it say.
textByHashes.f5de02e2a4a24f5950c017e65a59c0b9b04aa473: Me mighty warrior of Big High War God! Me find farmer working in field, and me attack! He so scared he run off! Then me trample on crops! This deeds of great warrior of Big High War God!
textByHashes.3d71ab569cf64a930477047811e99d5d7575687e: Me glad me finally get to secret goblin temple! Me walk long way to get here, always in danger of humans. But now me here, me safe! There no humans here!
textByHashes.4c25f2aa9763e7000b1355bb5d5da5b99ad2d8bb: Me hate humans! When me leave temple, me go and kill many human children!
textByHashes.6b6d61e18dbdb6f61dd8d94f1452c65fb5d40cad: Shh! Not to talk in temple!
textByHashes.dd97311974f706d50577e79428fa879f9444a8d3: Questions for High Priest. He the one that knows stuff.
textByHashes.397ebcfee60f09de49bec2f7c9ae39d11ae6b8ef: What that got to do with me?
textByHashes.5621cee2d868621916505be6b34661f59183b23e: Me no chef, ask village cook instead.
textByHashes.82d138fc295d2e7a5ec4dc5869c8e23785d7a4b1: Me not sure that allowed. You have to check with generals.
textByHashes.fa565d4ba11394642f4ee067cdf040ebc9bf47bd: Goblin century mark year of big battle on Plain of Mud. That when Big High War God give us commandments.
textByHashes.9c720e0d26556fd575c99474a1b0e86362015add: Big High War God take goblins and make them strong! Without him, we small and weak and stupid. But thanks to Big High War God, we most powerful race in Gielinor!
textByHashes.7210791365278b8a3f4e12f6ac74e8909255c582: Not to doubt word of Big High War God! I kill you!
textByHashes.77282b4a1792a45ec22215ca74ec994c4057b225: Slay enemies of Big High War God! Not show mercy! Not run from battle! Not doubt word of Big High War God!
textByHashes.6737ad908756f2df304d76c8fd96d0a6f9e544ca: Without commandments we not know right from wrong. We be like other races who not know war is good!
textByHashes.ce900890cf6fc334c16f38ae283dec4b1ca3dc91: That goblin secret! No human ever find Plain of Mud!
textByHashes.fc73a53343bfbb0dfa6f5c2cafaabd683a5b5d66: General Wartface and General Bentnoze both say it is. And normally they never agree!
textByHashes.e51aa7a0c0a6eed4efc0851ac41a5a23cc9108d5: Um... my brown armour getting wash.
textByHashes.f2a068662957cd4f5ed1c6d423e9ba11fea4faa3: It not red, it just red-ish brown!
textByHashes.6405eeb5758c94c547a8c5d66efbf89c1bae67ba: These dungeons are such a maze.
textByHashes.3f4da25900e6af6389b0b4432b1c8e24f5bdb844: I've been wandering around down here for hours.
textByHashes.dcf4ea1390e8efa7ccea967f16e0dcde4a45a20d: How can I get back to the village?
textByHashes.4498c6426cc58b4c916e74842652d03da8fb6d81: Where am I? I'm so lost.
textByHashes.a3e5bdd83212c70026cd7ff88635a9be3c95c615: I know the exit is around here, somewhere.
textByHashes.1e82f039682429439fda5fe985d81487e303ef03: This is the fifth time this week! I'm lost!
textByHashes.33fd03c573097cdd6e54ba8569684c40d3abc2e7: How could I be so disoriented?
